subject: fix(pwa): settle delay, cleanupOutdatedCaches, install prompt diagnostic
body:
Three improvements found during pattern audit:

1. checkForUpdate() now has a 1500ms settle delay after
   registration.update() — SW lifecycle events fire asynchronously
   after update() resolves, so without the delay the "Checking..."
   state flashes invisibly fast and events may not have propagated.
   Also added error handling with debugLog.

2. cleanupOutdatedCaches: true in workbox config — removes stale
   caches from incompatible older Workbox major versions that
   accumulate across deployments.

3. Fixed DebugPill install prompt diagnostic: usePWAInstall deletes
   window.__pwaInstallPromptEvent after consuming it, so the
   diagnostic always showed "Not received." Now sets a
   __pwaInstallPromptReceived flag before deleting, and DebugPill
   checks both sources.

Tags: pwa, debug, service-worker, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: patch
